name: salesflow-plugin
description: Portable sales workflow orchestration with bilingual triggers, evidence gates, and write-plan routing.

interface.shortDescription: Bilingual customer research, follow-up, briefing, and sales action workflows.
interface.longDescription: SalesFlow is a portable sales workflow layer. It routes customer research, communication summaries, follow-up drafts, daily briefings, meeting prep, competitive briefs, pipeline reviews, and quote readiness checks into evidence-grounded outputs and explicit write plans.
defaultPrompt: 帮我做客户背调并生成下一步建议
Summarize this customer conversation and draft a follow-up
今天我应该优先跟进哪些客户？
